overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage of a medieval gothic interior with a roaring fireplace. A robed NPC walks through the background while the camera remains stationary, capturing the warm atmospheric lighting and stone architecture.

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic view of a medieval gothic great hall with a roaring central fireplace casting warm light on the stone architecture. A robed NPC enters from the left archway and walks slowly across the background, passing behind the fireplace area before exiting right, while the camera remains fixed capturing the atmospheric interior details.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval gothic great hall where the stillness of the architecture is punctuated by a single passing figure. It begins with a wide cinematic gaze upon the stone interior, centered on a roaring fireplace that casts a warm, flickering glow across the surrounding masonry. As the scene unfolds, a robed NPC enters from a left archway, moving slowly across the background. The figure continues their steady pace, passing behind the warmth of the hearth before finally exiting through the right side of the hall, leaving the camera to linger on the quiet, glowing embers of the room.
